coordinate_system.note: GDD uses Ground level y=0; airborne obstacles use y=50 and y=80 above ground.

rules: All gameplay sprites (player, obstacles, ground, clouds) use only #535353 for non-transparent pixels.
UI text uses only #535353. White (#FFFFFF) is allowed only for runtime flash effects or overlays.

outline.rule: Sprite silhouettes must have a minimum 2px-thick edge where applicable; no 1px hairline edges.

transparency.alpha_requirement: All non-background sprites must have fully transparent background (alpha=0) outside the silhouette.

scale_support.note: Export 1x originals; 2x exports must be integer-scaled using nearest-neighbor (no filtering).

naming.frame_indexing: 1-based in filenames where specified by GDD (e.g., dino_run_1.png, dino_run_2.png)

definitions.P0: Required for a playable MVP (core gameplay and essential UI).
definitions.P1: Feature-complete look but not strictly blocking MVP.

description:
Player sprite rules (apply to every Player sprite below):
- Non-transparent pixels: #535353 only.
- Background: fully transparent.
- 2D side view, facing right (positive X).
- No shading, no gradients, no anti-aliasing.
- Silhouette edge thickness >=2px.


    Create a 2-frame run animation.

    - Canvas per frame: 88x94 px.
    - Frames: 2.
    - FPS: 12.

    Shared anchors (both frames):
    - Silhouette bounding box: x=8..79, y=0..89.
    - Eye hole: 6x6 transparent at (55,68).
    - Mouth slit: 10x2 transparent at (58,60).

    Frame-specific foot contact spans (opaque pixels at y=0):
    - run_1: x=30..37 inclusive must be opaque.
    - run_2: x=44..51 inclusive must be opaque.

    Export names: dino_run_1, dino_run_2.

context.usage: Plays whenever player is grounded and not ducking.

differences: Run uses 12 FPS and alternating foot contact spans.

acceptance_criteria: Two frames exist and are exactly 88x94 px.
run_1 has opaque pixels at y=0 for x=30..37; run_2 has opaque pixels at y=0 for x=44..51.
Eye hole and mouth slit match idle coordinates.
